title: LoomApp
description: Built a full-stack web platform as a graduation project featuring user authentication, role-based permissions, and profile management. Implemented a star-rating system with conditional rendering.

title: Nova
description: Designed and developed a responsive website with a modern UI layout, showcasing advanced HTML and CSS techniques.

title: Destini
description: Built an interactive branching narrative game with 7 different story endings. Integrated bilingual support (Arabic/English) using locale providers.

title: Speed Meter
description: Developed a mobile application to measure and display real-time internet speed efficiently.

title: ChatApp
description: Built a real-time chat application with backend architecture powered by Django.

title: To-Do API
description: Created a RESTful API for a to-do application supporting full CRUD operations and database synchronization.

title: 3D Web
description: Explored 3D web rendering using Three.js to build an interactive visual scene within the browser.

title: Glam
description: GLAM Project is a fashion-sharing website. The homepage displays the site's logo along with active buttons for Login, Sign Up, and Continue as a Guest.The interface is simple and modern, with support for buttons, page navigation, and a sized button at the top of the page. The site uses HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

title: Book
description: It is an interactive online library where users can browse books, listen to audiobooks, and manage their accounts and interests through a modern web interface. The project includes pages for viewing books, listening, personal accounts, and the library, with file organization that includes HTML, CSS, JavaScript, information, images, and audio files.
